## Summary

- What changed in the knowledge base?
- Why was the change needed?

## Change type

- [ ] Source ingest
- [ ] Concept or entity update
- [ ] Synthesis update
- [ ] Domain registry update
- [ ] Report or governance update
- [ ] Repository collaboration or workflow update

## Canonical impact

- Which canonical pages changed?
- Did `wiki/index.md` change?
- Did `wiki/log.md` change?

## Review path

- Start here:
- Key canonical pages:
- Related report pages:

## Validation

- [ ] I read the relevant source material before summarizing it
- [ ] Canonical conclusions still trace back to source pages
- [ ] `wiki/index.md` and `wiki/log.md` were updated when canonical knowledge changed
- [ ] I checked for obvious domain drift or duplicate conclusions

## Notes

- Anything reviewers should read first or treat cautiously?
